name: Piña Colada (shaken)
description: A shaken Piña Colada made with BACARDÍ Carta Blanca, fresh pineapple, coconut water, and crushed ice for a bright tropical cocktail. Discover our invigorating Piña Colada recipe using BACARDÍ Carta Blanca rum. This tropical cocktail combines fresh pineapple juice, coconut water, and white rum for a refreshing taste of the Caribbean. Learn how to make a Piña Colada the traditional shaken way – no blender needed!
recipe_steps: Add fresh pineapple and caster sugar to a cocktail shaker. Gently crush the pineapple with a muddler or the back of a spoon to release its sweet, tropical juice.
Pour BACARDÍ Carta Blanca Rum, pineapple juice, and coconut water into the shaker.
Add ice to the shaker, seal it tightly, and shake-shake-shake for 15-20 seconds until well-chilled.
Strain the mixture over crushed ice in a hurricane glass or a tall highball glass. Garnish with a fresh pineapple wedge.
searchable_text: Piña Colada (shaken) main rum BACARDÍ Carta Blanca A shaken Piña Colada made with BACARDÍ Carta Blanca, fresh pineapple, coconut water, and crushed ice for a bright tropical cocktail. Discover our invigorating Piña Colada recipe using BACARDÍ Carta Blanca rum. This tropical cocktail combines fresh pineapple juice, coconut water, and white rum for a refreshing taste of the Caribbean. Learn how to make a Piña Colada the traditional shaken way – no blender needed! ingredients 50 ml BACARDÍ Carta Blanca, 37.5 ml coconut water, 25 ml fresh pineapple juice, 3-4 chunks pineapple, 2 tsp caster sugar, pineapple wedge, crushed ice recipe steps Add fresh pineapple and caster sugar to a cocktail shaker. Gently crush the pineapple with a muddler or the back of a spoon to release its sweet, tropical juice. Pour BACARDÍ Carta Blanca Rum, pineapple juice, and coconut water into the shaker. Add ice to the shaker, seal it tightly, and shake-shake-shake for 15-20 seconds until well-chilled. Strain the mixture over crushed ice in a hurricane glass or a tall highball glass. Garnish with a fresh pineapple wedge.
